name: pii egress guard: allows credit-card-shaped numbers that fail Luhn (false-positive reduction per §5 C-6)
command: printf 'order 1234 5678 9012 3456 ships tomorrow\n' > payload.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/pii-egress-guard.sh" --input "$PWD/payload.txt" --check && echo ok 1>&2
